author: nicojeske
description: Increase or decrease the size of an image by scrolling.

manifest.author: Nico Jeske
manifest.description: This plugin enables you to increase/decrease the size of an image by scrolling
manifest.name: Mousewheel Image zoom

name: Mousewheel Image zoom

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- ✨ add support for PDF++ extension images [#63](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/63) by [Lslightly](https://github.com/Lslightly)

## Chores
- :bookmark: Bump version to 1.0.24 ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/8dc23c252d6a0a12455ebe726e5f66ca69e3d9ed))
- :arrow_up: Upgrade setup-node action to v4 ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/7d7dadcb4de96566a17b5dec2b060457d67e37ad))

## Commits
- 2ea919c: format getZoomParams (lqw@laptop) [#63](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/63)
- 6055208: add support for data:image/png;...-like image (lqw@laptop) [#63](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/63)
- 74dc9c4: add doc instructions for development (lqw@laptop) [#63](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/63)
- 2af9033: Merge pull request #63 (Nico Jeske) [#63](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/63)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- :sparkles: Add warning notice for Ctrl key conflict with canvas resizing for existing users of Ctrl ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/3c751a87ffe7bb0133b1fcce6dac12272d8c4e6c))

## Bug Fixes
- :bug: Ignore keydown event for canvas mode when resizing is disabled ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/f7916b35f56a0c3de57ad5e7e88a8d69e6778b2c))
- :bug: Add blur event handler to re-enable scrolling when switching windows ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/d8e102fcc1b4fdb30b8ecf1d855f597742cd7f1d))
- :bug: Do not attempt to use image attributes for markdown links ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/3cd90ef87f5176a9dfd2b7fd62c096cb3d35533c))

## Code Refactoring
- :recycle: Use recommended way to modify file text ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/fa014c89a52512cc403c4f6d82a96741640ae917))
- :recycle: Enable canvas as default but show warning in settings page ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/c0f80fc08d1a5a8c940d303cf4333b88073ee671))
- :recycle: Separate frontmatter and body in file processing ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/d08749232d6fc1f1d58d7bcf7f2acdb83043153b))

## Chores
- :bookmark: Update to version 1.0.23 ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/b56abcdadfffe592e83bdcad1e9f08b0cdb3558b))

## Commits
- 3d2cb81: Add an option to resize nodes on the canvas (Mideks) [#50](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/50)
- 11a8caf: Fixed typo (Mideks) [#50](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/50)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- ✨ Implement zooming functionality for all canvas nodes (@Mideks) [#48](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/48)

## Bug Fixes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
- :bug: Fixed new event registration according to obsidian documentation (Mideks) [#45](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/45)
- :bug: Remove ; in function parameter [#45](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/45) ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/33e30d66c737cb347f31a71066117c373de2ebcf))

## Chores
- :bookmark: Bump to version 1.0.21 ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/96b1c91be58682f6e1e04590e287526305ffcd0a))
- 🔇 Delete feature test logging (Mideks) [#46](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/46)

## Commits
- 4811a2d: Merge branch 'master' of https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom (Nico Jeske)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- :sparkles: Improve image name parsing [#41](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/41) ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/5f05118df67734a0223d846c0ee872c5a17c25ec))
- :sparkles: Add support for the right side modifier keys [#42](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/42) ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/babab170e3ac71cb7caa565d1d9d22717112d79e))
- :sparkles: Allow horizontal scrolling when Shift is the trigger key. [#43](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/43) ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/342f2946d02fab28e7ebdc9f892b65e17fb79739))
- :sparkles: Add support for local files [#41](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/41) ([Mideks](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/2cf815c64150bc38b2dc73b32e9b83779fe4c22d))
- :sparkles: Scaling now works correctly in the new windows [#40](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/40) ([Mideks](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/c97d602c328e0a3b4994c4ca8f03e7332d5ec1a0))


## Bug Fixes
- :bug: Show correct value for initial size in settings [#44](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/44) ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/e549f06a5467d44b92ce6c56af48e5b15234afaa))
- :bug: Fix zoom for excalidraw images (#28) [#39](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/39) ([Mideks](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/39/commits/3968266b5eda5bf9cc71b2f35399736aaee18b28))


## Code Refactoring
- :recycle: Add strict typing for new functions [#40](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/40) ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/fa82b9c05acb4f2cf46afc7048e7f0a65322e2f9))

## Chores
- :arrow_up: Upgrade to latest obsidian type definitions [#40](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/pull/40) ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/2f436fd56bdbf36f7e49f970e9d97f91e7609dd0))
- :bookmark: Release version 1.0.20 ([Nico Jeske](https://github.com/nicojeske/mousewheel-image-zoom/commit/2524f23c013514e6f9940da96640f5ea9b5e4c2a))

This release contains following improvements:

releases.author: nicojeske
releases.description:
This release contains following improvements:
- Correctly determine the correct file, if  the same image exists on multiple open pages.

releases.author: nicojeske
releases.description:
This release contains following improvements:

- Preventing the user from decreasing the size of an image to 0
- The plugin now works if you have multiple notes open.
releases.name: Mousewheel image zoom v1.0.6

releases.author: nicojeske
releases.description: - Revert back to using keydown and keyup event, as otherwise we are not able to disable the normal scrolling behaviour.
releases.name: Mousewheel image zoom v1.0.5

releases.author: nicojeske
releases.description: - Refactored Code based on feedback from the pull request to the obsidian community plugin list.
releases.name: Mousewheel image zoom v1.0.4

releases.author: nicojeske
releases.description: - Remove left over console.logs
releases.name: Mousewheel image zoom v1.0.3

releases.author: nicojeske
releases.description: - Add support for images in tables by dynamically using \\| instead of |
releases.name: Mousewheel image zoom v1.0.2

releases.author: nicojeske
releases.description: - Fixed a bug, where the decode of the image Uri in Linux did not convert the %2F in front of the filename to a \ . which led to the plugin not working as intended
releases.name: Mousewheel image zoom v1.0.1
